Our Philosophy

The Three Pillars of Lumi SKN

We believe skincare isn't a one-size-fits-all regimen. It's a precise science paired with a visual art.

Clinical Precision

We use cutting-edge aesthetic devices and medical-grade formulas to deliver structural, long-lasting improvements at cellular levels.

Bespoke Design

Every face is unique. We begin with a deep skin analysis to map your concerns and design a tailored pathway matching your skin profile.

Sensory Rest

Clinical results don't require clinical discomfort. Experience our serene studio ambiance and customized massage rituals during your therapy.

Skin Assessment

Find Your Perfect Treatment

Unsure which facial or treatment fits your skin? Take our 60-second interactive matching assessment to see our professional recommendation.

Question 1 of 3

What is your current skin type?

Question 2 of 3

What is your primary skin concern?

Question 3 of 3

What is your primary treatment goal?

Our cornerstone facial. Combines microdermabrasion, customized peptide infusions, and cryo-sculpting to lift, plump, and glow.

Clinical Nd:YAG laser treatment targeting fine lines, redness, and pigmentation, stimulating long-term collagen synthesis.

Pharmaceutical-grade AHA/BHA chemical peels customized to dissolve dead skin layers and uncover fresh, porcelain skin textures.

Real Results

Loved by Our Clients

Read how Lumi SKN treatments have transformed skin wellness and confidence.

"The Lumi Signature Glow completely transformed my skin before my wedding. The dullness is gone, and my skin feels incredibly hydrated and plump. I've received so many compliments on my natural glow!"
Eleanor Vance
Client for 1 Year (Dry / Sensitive Skin)
"Struggled with acne scars for years. The Nd:YAG laser treatments paired with customized chemical peels here did what years of skincare products couldn't. Professional, knowledgeable, and a serene studio space."
Marcus Sterling
Client for 6 Months (Acne-Prone Skin)
"The skin analysis was incredibly detailed! They explained exactly what my barrier needed and customized my treatment. The attention to detail and relaxing massage made it a therapeutic retreat."
Sophia Al-Jamil
Client for 8 Months (Combination Skin)
Our Treatment Menu

Advanced Skincare Services

Every treatment is custom-tailored to your unique genetic skin profile during our preliminary consultation.

Signature

Lumi Signature Glow

$150 60 Mins

Our absolute bestseller. Designed to intensely hydrate, oxygenate, and awaken fatigued skin cells for an immediate luminous plumpness.

Includes:

  • Double oil cleanse & skin analysis
  • Ultrasonic exfoliation
  • Custom multi-peptide cocktail infusion
  • Ice-globe lymphatic drainage massage

Advanced Hydro-Clarifying

$170 75 Mins

Designed for congested, acne-prone, or oily skin types. Uses vacuum-powered vortex extraction to clear pores while feeding skin nourishing antioxidants.

Includes:

  • Salicylic acid pore prep
  • Vortex vacuum blackhead extraction
  • High-frequency antibacterial therapy
  • Calming green tea & tea tree alginate mask
Advanced

Nd:YAG Laser Collagen Booster

$280 45 Mins

A non-ablative laser treatment that penetrates deep dermis layers. Destroys sub-clinical bacteria, shrinks capillaries, and triggers rapid collagen production.

Includes:

  • Clinical double cleanse
  • Laser safety eye-shield prep
  • Nd:YAG target-pulse therapy
  • Soothing copper-peptide recovery serum

Hollywood Carbon Laser Peel

$220 60 Mins

Utilizes a medical-grade liquid carbon layer which binds to skin oils and impurities. The laser then blasts the carbon away, instantly vaporizing dead skin and tightening pores.

Includes:

  • Application of liquid carbon mask
  • Targeted laser blast exfoliation
  • Cooling aloe-vera sheet mask
  • UV broad spectrum protection

Glow Radiance AHA Peel

$140 45 Mins

An entry-level, zero-downtime peel utilizing high-concentration Glycolic and Lactic acids. Gently digests surface bonds, lifting hyperpigmentation and smoothing texture.

Includes:

  • pH balancing skin prep
  • Acid solution brushing (timed)
  • Alkaline neutralizing therapy
  • Calming oat-infused recovery gel
Corrective

Clinical BHA Acne Control Peel

$180 50 Mins

A deeper, self-neutralizing Salicylic acid peel that dissolves sebum inside hair follicles. Unclogs severe blackheads, controls sebum, and dries active cystic breakouts.

Includes:

  • Clarifying deep cleanse
  • Salicylic acid (20-30%) topical peel
  • Targeted comedone extraction
  • Zinc-PCA repair barrier mask
What to Expect

Your Skincare Journey

We make sure that your clinical treatments are safe, relaxed, and transparent at every step.

01

Clinical Assessment

We analyze your skin barrier using specialized UV diagnostics, looking at hydration percentage, pore blockage, and pigmentation depth.

02

Tailored Selection

Our aesthetician selects specific enzymes, acids, or laser parameters suited exactly to your skin tolerance and goals.

03

Precise Execution

Relax in our heated memory-foam treatment beds while we perform your clinical procedure, complete with a neck massage.

04

Dermal Protection

We seal your skin with targeted lipid-restoring serums, hyaluronic barriers, and professional SPF to protect the freshly exfoliated cells.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Got questions about skincare, preparations, or clinical lasers? We have compiled the answers.

For best results, please stop using high-strength active ingredients like Retinols, Glycolic acid, Salicylic acid, or benzoyl peroxide 3 days before your facial. Avoid active sunburns and waxing. Men are requested to avoid shaving the face on the morning of their facial to prevent barrier sensitivity.

Our Nd:YAG Laser Collagen Booster is non-ablative, meaning there is zero downtime. You might experience a slight pink flush for 30-60 minutes post-treatment, but you can immediately apply sunscreen/makeup and return to normal activities. Deeper carbon peels might leave minor redness for up to 4 hours.

For standard maintenance and cellular turnover upkeep, we recommend booking a customized facial every 4 to 6 weeks. Corrective treatments targeting severe acne, scarring, or deep hyperpigmentation are typically planned in series of 3 to 6 sessions spaced 2 to 4 weeks apart.

Yes, absolutely. We specialize in calming inflamed barriers. Our clinical experts will bypass abrasive scrubs and high-strength acid peels in favor of soothing enzymes, cryo-sculpting, and lipid-replenishing hydration treatments designed specifically to calm rosacea and build up skin resistance.

LUMI SKN

Science-backed skin diagnostics and tailored aesthetic therapies in a tranquil wellness sanctuary.
